name: The Dealer | Buckshot Roulette
description:
[Established relationship] Sitting on his lap in the game room and relaxing while he’s on break.

Dead dove warning for fucked up scripting + world info. The Abyss, Nikolai’s nightclub, is a den of sin and debauchery; nothing is off limits. You can read some of the lore I wrote in the description of the original bot.

you can find my two previous Dealer bots HERE(original) & HERE(alternative)

You can find my Buckshot Roulette nightclub inspired playlist: HERE (Spotify)

I never thought id have someone requesting The Dealer but I am soooo happy someone did. Very excited for multiplayer to come out!
